$comment: Ready-to-use Adaptive Card template for the Weekly Training Check-In. Version: Adaptive Cards 1.5. To wire this card to the Weekly Check-In topic, replace the conversational Question nodes with a SendActivity node that renders this card, then map the submit action outputs to topic variables (currentWeight, trainingHighlights, trainingChallenges, painDiscomfort, adjustmentRequests).

body.text: Let's review your week and keep your programme on track.

body.errorMessage: Please enter your current weight in kg.

body.placeholder: How did training go this week? Any wins or personal bests?
body.errorMessage: Please share at least one highlight.

body.placeholder: Any sessions you missed, low-energy days, or struggles? Type 'none' if not applicable.
body.errorMessage: Please describe any challenges or type 'none'.

body.placeholder: Describe any pain or discomfort experienced during training. Type 'none' if not applicable.
Would you like any changes to your programme? e.g. more cardio, reduce intensity, swap exercises.
